missions.name: First Contact
missions.description: Establish a forward base and repel the initial Resistance incursion.
missions.briefing: Commander, Resistance forces have been detected in the northern sector. Build a Command Centre and train infantry to secure the area. This is our first engagement — prove the Confederation's resolve.

missions.name: Power Grid
missions.description: Establish power infrastructure and defend against a counterattack.
missions.briefing: Our foothold is tenuous. We need Generators to power our buildings. The Resistance will not sit idle — fortify your position before they mount a counterattack.

missions.name: Infantry Advance
missions.description: Push forward with upgraded infantry and capture the ridge.
missions.briefing: The Resistance holds a strategic ridge overlooking the valley. Research infantry upgrades at the Tech Centre and push forward. Our grenadiers can break their defensive line.

missions.name: Heavy Metal
missions.description: Deploy vehicle forces and crush the Resistance armor division.
missions.briefing: Intelligence reports a Resistance vehicle depot to the east. Build a Machine Factory and deploy Hammer tanks. The Zeus heavy tank will spearhead our assault.

missions.name: Siege of Fort Bravo
missions.description: Besiege the fortified Resistance position using artillery.
missions.briefing: Fort Bravo is heavily defended with bunkers and towers. Deploy Torrent MLRS units in siege mode to bombard their defenses from range. Infantry will follow to mop up survivors.

missions.name: Operation Thunderstrike
missions.description: Launch a combined arms assault on the Resistance headquarters.
missions.briefing: We have located the Resistance headquarters. This is the decisive battle. Use all available forces — infantry, armor, and artillery. There will be no second chance.

missions.name: Final Stand
missions.description: The Resistance makes a desperate last stand. Crush them utterly.
missions.briefing: The remnants of the Resistance have consolidated for a final stand. They will fight with the desperation of the doomed. Show no mercy — end this war. The Confederation will prevail.
